Plan.path: Plan > Target Audience Analysis > Cohort-specific cognitive vulnerability mapping > Veteran & uniformed-service vulnerability mapping > Combat-veteran vulnerability > Trust-network mapping (combat-veteran)

Prepare.path: Prepare > Select Channels and Affordances > Embodied AI and robotic influence channel > Influence-affordance class > situational urgency cue

Execute.path: Execute > Drive Offline Activity > AI-agentic architecture lattice > Multi-agent swarm pressure > Agent role class > Persona operator agent role within offline mobilisation

exposure_network_assignment.edge_meaning: The source position is a visible peer whose output was plausibly exposed to the target position; derived from source user liking, reposting, or quoting target user content in the raw data.
